Interactive movement
format:
Controls / Preview
Spread / Adduct (S): —°
Flex (F): —°
Predicted Motor A: —°
Predicted Motor B: —°
Notes
- Drag inside the shaded region while holding mouse / touch to move continuously.
- Top horizontal edge (F=0) = fully extended (A=B=90). You can only move DOWN from there.
